scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ledgerpilot/core && npm run build --workspace @ledgerpilot/ui && npm run build --workspace @ledgerpilot/desktop
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @ledgerpilot/core && npm run lint --workspace @ledgerpilot/ui && npm run lint --workspace @ledgerpilot/desktop
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @ledgerpilot/core && npm run test --workspace @ledgerpilot/ui && npm run test --workspace @ledgerpilot/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @ledgerpilot/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @ledgerpilot/ui && npm run typecheck --workspace @ledgerpilot/desktop
